0:{"P":null,"c":["","blog"],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["blog",{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/myblog/_next/static/chunks/01bfvyeft-mpe.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/myblog/_next/static/chunks/0-ifzbs-ipknq.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/myblog/_next/static/chunks/0d3shmwh5_nmn.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"source_serif_4_a883fd0f-module__4BFFWq__variable ibm_plex_sans_b57fb04e-module__ef9q1G__variable jetbrains_mono_7f3086f3-module__paa25G__variable","suppressHydrationWarning":true,"children":[["$","head",null,{"children":["$","script",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"\n(function(){try{var s=localStorage.getItem('theme');var d=s?s==='dark':window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches;if(d)document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme','dark');}catch(e){}})();\n"}}]}],["$","body",null,{"children":[["$","$L2",null,{}],["$","main",null,{"children":["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L4",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":[["$","section",null,{"className":"hero","style":{"borderBottom":"none"},"children":["$","div",null,{"className":"container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"eyebrow","children":"Error 404"}],["$","h1",null,{"children":["This page",["$","br",null,{}],["$","em",null,{"children":"wandered off"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"className":"muted","style":{"fontSize":17,"maxWidth":460,"margin":"24px 0 32px"},"children":"The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved. Let's get you back on track."}],["$","$L5",null,{"className":"btn","href":"/","children":"Back home เพื่อแชร์แบ่งปันความรู้และประสบการณ์ให้กับทุกคนที่สนใจในเรื่องนี้ ผมหวังว่าบล็อกนี้จะเป็นแหล่งข้อมูลที่มีประโยชน์และเป็นแรงบันดาลใจให้กับเพื่อนที่ต้องการเรียนรู้เกี่ยวกับวิศวกรรมระบบและเทคโนโลยีต่างๆ ที่เกี่ยวข้อง"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","h4",null,{"children":"Pages"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L5",null,{"href":"/","children":"Home"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L5",null,{"href":"/blog","children":"Blog"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L5",null,{"href":"/work","children":"Work"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L5",null,{"href":"/about","children":"About"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L5",null,{"href":"/contact","children":"Contact"}]}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","h4",null,{"children":"Elsewhere"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li","GitHub",{"children":["$","$L5",null,{"href":"https://github.com/porwarit45","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener noreferrer","children":"GitHub"}]}],["$","li","LinkedIn",{"children":["$","$L5",null,{"href":"https://linkedin.com","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener noreferrer","children":"LinkedIn"}]}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","h4",null,{"children":"Contact"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":["$","a",null,{"href":"mailto:porwarit.w@gmail.com","children":"porwarit.w@gmail.com"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":"พระนครศรีอยุธยา, Thailand"}]]}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"footer-bottom","children":[["$","span",null,{"children":["© ",2026," ","Porwarit Thaithavee"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Built with Next.js · ","Issue 24 · May 2026"]}]]}]]}]}]]}]]}]]}],{"children":[["$","$1","c",{"children":[null,["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L4",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":"$undefined","forbidden":"$undefined","unauthorized":"$undefined"}]]}],{"children":[["$","$1","c",{"children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"page-enter","children":["$","section",null,{"className":"hero","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"eyebrow","children":"The archive"}],["$","h1",null,{"children":["Every ",["$","em",null,{"children":"essay"}],["$","br",null,{}],"I've written"]}],["$","$L6",null,{"posts":[{"slug":"shipping-fast-without-breaking-things","number":"01","title":"Shipping Fast Without Breaking Things","date":"2026-04-28","excerpt":"Speed and stability aren't opposites. A look at the small habits that let small teams deploy many times a day with confidence.","tag":"Engineering","readTime":"6 min","featured":true,"body":[{"kind":"lede","text":"The fastest teams I've worked on weren't fast because they skipped steps. They were fast because their steps were cheap. Every check that used to require a meeting became a script. Every script became a pipeline. Every pipeline became invisible."},{"kind":"h2","text":"Make the safe path the easy path"},{"kind":"p","text":"People don't route around process because they're reckless — they route around it because it's slow. If the well-tested path is also the path of least resistance, you barely have to enforce anything."},{"kind":"pull","text":"The goal isn't zero risk. It's making risk small, observable, and reversible."},{"kind":"h2","text":"Three habits that compound"},{"kind":"ul","items":["Trunk-based development. Long-lived branches hide integration risk until it's expensive. Merge daily.","Feature flags over release branches. Decouple deploy from release so a rollback is a config change, not a redeploy.","Fast, honest tests. A test suite under ten minutes gets run. One that takes an hour gets skipped."]},{"kind":"h2","text":"A note on confidence"},{"kind":"p","text":"Confidence isn't a personality trait, it's a property of your system. When the path from commit to production is observable end to end, 'move fast' stops being a slogan and starts being the default."},{"kind":"p","text":"That last line is the whole trick: the risky moment is a dial you control, not a leap you take."}]},{"slug":"design-systems-that-survive","number":"02","title":"Design Systems That Survive Their First Year","date":"2026-03-12","excerpt":"Most design systems die from neglect, not bad design. What separates the ones that last from the ones that become a graveyard of deprecated components.","tag":"Design","readTime":"8 min","body":[{"kind":"lede","text":"A design system is easy to start and hard to keep. The launch is a party; year two is the test. The systems that survive share a few unglamorous traits."},{"kind":"h2","text":"Components are a contract, not a suggestion"},{"kind":"p","text":"If a button can be overridden into anything, it isn't a button — it's a styled div with extra steps. Constrain the API to the decisions that actually matter, and make the rest impossible."},{"kind":"h2","text":"Tokens before components"},{"kind":"p","text":"Ship color, spacing, and type scales first. They're cheap to adopt incrementally and they make every later component consistent for free."},{"kind":"h2","text":"Adoption is a product problem"},{"kind":"ul","items":["Migrate one real screen yourself before asking anyone else to.","Treat the docs site like a product with its own users.","Measure adoption like a funnel — what's installed, what's imported, what's actually rendered."]},{"kind":"pull","text":"A component nobody can find is a component nobody will use."},{"kind":"h2","text":"Plan for deprecation on day one"},{"kind":"p","text":"You will get things wrong. The question is whether removing a mistake costs an afternoon or a quarter. Version your components, log usage, and make the deprecation path as well-lit as the adoption one."}]},{"slug":"the-edge-is-just-a-computer","number":"03","title":"The Edge Is Just a Computer (a Smaller One)","date":"2026-01-30","excerpt":"Edge functions feel magical until they don't. A practical mental model for what actually changes when your code runs close to the user.","tag":"Web","readTime":"5 min","body":[{"kind":"lede","text":"'Run it at the edge' gets thrown around like it's free. It isn't — it's a trade. Once you see the trade clearly, the magic becomes a tool."},{"kind":"h2","text":"What you gain"},{"kind":"p","text":"Latency to your code drops because the code is near the user. For anything that can be computed without a round trip to your primary database, this is a real and large win."},{"kind":"h2","text":"What you pay"},{"kind":"ul","items":["Distance to your data. The edge is close to the user and far from your database. A chatty handler can be slower at the edge than in one region.","A smaller runtime. No full Node API, tight CPU and memory budgets, cold paths you can't always see.","Harder debugging. 'It works on my machine' is now 'it works in one of forty regions.'"]},{"kind":"pull","text":"Put computation at the edge. Keep state behind it. Cache the boundary between them."},{"kind":"p","text":"Auth checks, redirects, A/B assignment, personalization headers — perfect for the edge. Multi-step transactional writes — keep them in a region next to your data and let the edge just route there."},{"kind":"p","text":"The edge isn't a different paradigm. It's the same computer, smaller, in more places. Design for that and it stops surprising you."}]}]}]]}]}]}],["$L7"],"$L8"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@9"]},null,false,null],"$La",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$b",["$Lc"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"cq9Q9J7UkxT6Kp5YPUbwV"}

14:[["$","title","0",{"children":"Blog — Porwarit Thaithavee"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"Essays on building software, design systems, and the web."}],["$","meta","2",{"property":"og:title","content":"Porwarit Thaithavee — System Engineer"}],["$","meta","3",{"property":"og:description","content":"ผมกำลังเรียนรู้การเขียนบล็อกนี้เป็นครั้งแรก เพื่อแชร์แบ่งปันความรู้และประสบการณ์ให้กับทุกคนที่สนใจในเรื่องนี้ ผมหวังว่าบล็อกนี้จะเป็นแหล่งข้อมูลที่มีประโยชน์และเป็นแรงบันดาลใจให้กับเพื่อนที่ต้องการเรียนรู้เกี่ยวกับวิศวกรรมระบบและเทคโนโลยีต่างๆ ที่เกี่ยวข้อง"}],["$","meta","4",{"property":"og:url","content":"https://alexrivera.dev"}],["$","meta","5",{"property":"og:site_name","content":"Porwarit Thaithavee"}],["$","meta","6",{"property":"og:type","content":"website"}],["$","meta","7",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}],["$","meta","8",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"Porwarit Thaithavee — System Engineer"}],["$","meta","9",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"ผมกำลังเรียนรู้การเขียนบล็อกนี้เป็นครั้งแรก เพื่อแชร์แบ่งปันความรู้และประสบการณ์ให้กับทุกคนที่สนใจในเรื่องนี้ ผมหวังว่าบล็อกนี้จะเป็นแหล่งข้อมูลที่มีประโยชน์และเป็นแรงบันดาลใจให้กับเพื่อนที่ต้องการเรียนรู้เกี่ยวกับวิศวกรรมระบบและเทคโนโลยีต่างๆ ที่เกี่ยวข้อง"}],["$","link","10",{"rel":"icon","href":"/myblog/favicon.ico?favicon.0x3dzn~oxb6tn.ico","sizes":"256x256","type":"image/x-icon"}],["$","$L15","11",{}]]
